---
title: "Predicted seagrass carbon map at Ria de Aveiro for 2024 and 2025"
author: "Lee, Chengfa Benjamin"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: bookdown::html_document2
bibliography: references.bib 
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(magrittr)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(leaflet)
library(terra)
library(ggplot2)
```

This page documents the results of the _Zostera noltii_ seagrass carbon mapping work at Ria de Aviero. This includes work done in:

* [The fieldtrip of Aveiro 2025](https://sigoiry.github.io/Spectra_Aveiro_2025/) by [Simon Oiry](https://github.com/SigOiry)
* [Coring Carbon Seagrass](https://sigoiry.github.io/Coring_Carbon_Seagrasses/) by Simon Oiry
* [Exploring the relationship between seagrass reflectance and biomass](https://leechengfa.github.io/Seagrass_reflectance_biomass_2025.github.io/)

All analyses were performed in R version 4.5.2 [@Rversion].
All work belong to the [REWRITE project](https://rewriteproject.eu/).

# Study Location

This page focuses on Ria de Aveiro, a [demonstrator site for the REWRITE PROJECT](https://rewriteproject.eu/demonstrator-network/ria-de-aveiro). A natural site and rewilded site was designated in the lagoon and seagrass meadows were found in both sites. Its seagrass meadow was estimated to be 3.52 km^2^ during the peak season of 2024 [@davies2024].

The sites were sampled according to a grid, and additional stations were sampled randomly within the grid.

```{r samplingDesign}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

stations <- read_sf('data/shp/Points.shp') %>%
  filter(!is.na(seagrassA)) %>%
  select(name, type, site, habitat, longitude, latitude)

group_bounds <- read_sf('data/shp/Polygons.shp')
  group_bounds$colour <- c('darkred','darkgreen')

map_centre <- stations %>% 
  st_union() %>%
  st_centroid() %>%
  st_coordinates()

pal.shp <- colorFactor(c('darkgreen','darkred'), domain = c('natural','rewilded'))

m.shp <- leaflet(stations) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.PositronNoLabels) %>%
  setView(map_centre[1], map_centre[2], 14) %>%
  addCircleMarkers(radius = 2, color = ~pal.shp(site), fillOpacity = 1, label = ~name) %>%
  addLegend(pal = pal.shp, values = ~site, opacity = 1)

m.shp
```

# Seasonal change in NDVI

```{r phenologySetUp}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

phenology <- data.frame(list(
  "tile.name" = list.files('data/ice_creams_prediction') %>%
    gsub('_Pred_BFRD_V1_3.tif', '', .)
))
  phenology$date <- lapply(phenology$tile.name, FUN = function(string) {
    x <- string %>%
      strsplit("_") %>%
      unlist() %>%
      "["(3) %>%
      strsplit("T") %>%
      unlist() %>%
      "["(1)

    return(x)
  }) %>% unlist() %>% as.Date('%Y%m%d')

  phenology$ndvi.mean <- NA
  phenology$ndvi.sd <- NA

import.icecreams <- function(image.path) {
  map.ice <- rast(image.path)
    map.ice[map.ice == 0 | map.ice == -1] <- NA
    
  return(map.ice)
}
  
import.ndvi <- function(image.path) {
  map.index <- rast(image.path)
  
  return(map.index)
}  

for (n in phenology$tile.name) {
  pheno.icecreams <- list.files('data/ice_creams_prediction', full.names = TRUE) %>%
    grep(n, ., value = TRUE) %>%
    import.icecreams()
  
  pheno.ndvi <- list.files('data/ndvi', full.names = TRUE) %>%
    grep(n, ., value = TRUE) %>%
    import.ndvi() %>%
    mask(pheno.icecreams$Out_Class, inverse = TRUE, maskvalues = 4)
  pheno.ndvi[pheno.icecreams$Seagrass_Cover < 20] <- NA

  phenology$ndvi.mean[phenology$tile.name == n] <- global(pheno.ndvi, fun = 'mean', na.rm = TRUE)
  phenology$ndvi.sd[phenology$tile.name == n] <- global(pheno.ndvi, fun = 'sd', na.rm = TRUE)
}
```

```{r phenologyndvi}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.cap: Mean NDVI value of pixels classified by the ICE CREAMS model as seagrass in 2024 and 2025. The black line denotes the actual mean NDVI values while the blue line and grey ribbons are the geom_smooth values. The dotted red line indicates the chosen date (2025-07-15) for showcasing the analyses.

phenology$ndvi.mean <- unlist(phenology$ndvi.mean)
phenology$ndvi.sd <- unlist(phenology$ndvi.sd)

ggplot(phenology, aes(x = date, y = ndvi.mean, colour = NA)) +
  # geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ndvi.mean - ndvi.sd, ymax = ndvi.mean + ndvi.sd), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.Date('20250715', '%Y%m%d'), colour = 'red', linetype = 2, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(colour = 'Sentinel-2 derived'), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_smooth(aes(colour = 'ggplot2 smoothed')) + 
  xlab('Date') + ylab('Mean NDVI over seagrass pixels') +
  # manual legend creation 
  scale_colour_manual('Time Trend', values = c('Sentinel-2 derived' = 'black', 'ggplot2 smoothed' = 'blue')) +
  theme(legend.position = 'bottom', legend.direction = "horizontal")
```

# ICE CREAMS Model prediction

For the purpose of map display and data analysis, the result from the Sentinel-2 image on 15 July 2025 was chosen. This date falls within the fieldwork dates and is thus best for validation and groundtruthing. 

```{r customleafletfunctionlegenddecreasing}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

## function copied from stackoverflow
## https://stackoverflow.com/questions/40276569/reverse-order-in-r-leaflet-continuous-legend
addLegend_decreasing <- function (map, position = c("topright", "bottomright", "bottomleft","topleft"),
                                  pal, values, na.label = "NA", bins = 7, colors, 
                                  opacity = 0.5, labels = NULL, labFormat = labelFormat(), 
                                  title = NULL, className = "info legend", layerId = NULL, 
                                  group = NULL, data = getMapData(map), decreasing = FALSE) {
  
        position <- match.arg(position)
        type <- "unknown"
        na.color <- NULL
        extra <- NULL
        if (!missing(pal)) {
            if (!missing(colors)) 
                stop("You must provide either 'pal' or 'colors' (not both)")
            if (missing(title) && inherits(values, "formula")) 
                title <- deparse(values[[2]])
            values <- evalFormula(values, data)
            type <- attr(pal, "colorType", exact = TRUE)
            args <- attr(pal, "colorArgs", exact = TRUE)
            na.color <- args$na.color
            if (!is.null(na.color) && col2rgb(na.color, alpha = TRUE)[[4]] == 
                    0) {
                na.color <- NULL
            }
            if (type != "numeric" && !missing(bins)) 
                warning("'bins' is ignored because the palette type is not numeric")
            if (type == "numeric") {
                cuts <- if (length(bins) == 1) 
                    pretty(values, bins)
                else bins   
                if (length(bins) > 2) 
                    if (!all(abs(diff(bins, differences = 2)) <= 
                                     sqrt(.Machine$double.eps))) 
                        stop("The vector of breaks 'bins' must be equally spaced")
                n <- length(cuts)
                r <- range(values, na.rm = TRUE)
                cuts <- cuts[cuts >= r[1] & cuts <= r[2]]
                n <- length(cuts)
                p <- (cuts - r[1])/(r[2] - r[1])
                extra <- list(p_1 = p[1], p_n = p[n])
                p <- c("", paste0(100 * p, "%"), "")
                if (decreasing == TRUE){
                    colors <- pal(rev(c(r[1], cuts, r[2])))
                    labels <- rev(labFormat(type = "numeric", cuts))
                }else{
                    colors <- pal(c(r[1], cuts, r[2]))
                    labels <- rev(labFormat(type = "numeric", cuts))
                }
                colors <- paste(colors, p, sep = " ", collapse = ", ")
            }
            else if (type == "bin") {
                cuts <- args$bins
                n <- length(cuts)
                mids <- (cuts[-1] + cuts[-n])/2
                if (decreasing == TRUE){
                    colors <- pal(rev(mids))
                    labels <- rev(labFormat(type = "bin", cuts))
                }else{
                    colors <- pal(mids)
                    labels <- labFormat(type = "bin", cuts)
                }
            }
            else if (type == "quantile") {
                p <- args$probs
                n <- length(p)
                cuts <- quantile(values, probs = p, na.rm = TRUE)
                mids <- quantile(values, probs = (p[-1] + p[-n])/2, na.rm = TRUE)
                if (decreasing == TRUE){
                    colors <- pal(rev(mids))
                    labels <- rev(labFormat(type = "quantile", cuts, p))
                }else{
                    colors <- pal(mids)
                    labels <- labFormat(type = "quantile", cuts, p)
                }
            }
            else if (type == "factor") {
                v <- sort(unique(na.omit(values)))
                colors <- pal(v)
                labels <- labFormat(type = "factor", v)
                if (decreasing == TRUE){
                    colors <- pal(rev(v))
                    labels <- rev(labFormat(type = "factor", v))
                }else{
                    colors <- pal(v)
                    labels <- labFormat(type = "factor", v)
                }
            }
            else stop("Palette function not supported")
            if (!any(is.na(values))) 
                na.color <- NULL
        }
        else {
            if (length(colors) != length(labels)) 
                stop("'colors' and 'labels' must be of the same length")
        }
        legend <- list(colors = I(unname(colors)), labels = I(unname(labels)), 
                                     na_color = na.color, na_label = na.label, opacity = opacity, 
                                     position = position, type = type, title = title, extra = extra, 
                                     layerId = layerId, className = className, group = group)
        invokeMethod(map, data, "addLegend", legend)
        }
```

```{r icecreams}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

pal.icecreams <- c('#ded4c3','#926e62','#c6c97c','#8ca271','#ddac74','#a9665e','#ca474f','#9ec8c7','#b8dc70')
labels.icecreams <- c("Bare Sand","Bare Sediment","Chlorophyta","Magnoliopsida","Microphytobenthos","Phaeophyceae","Rhodophyta","Water","Xanthophyceae")

map.class <- import.icecreams('data/ice_creams_prediction/S2C_MSIL2A_20250715T113341_N0511_R080_T29TNF_20250715T165315_Pred_BFRD_V1_3.tif')
  levels(map.class$Out_Class) <- data.frame(id=1:9, cover = labels.icecreams)

pal.class <- colorFactor(pal.icecreams, domain = 1:9, na.color = "transparent")
```

```{r icecreamsseagrass}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

map.class.seagrass <- map.class
  map.class.seagrass$Out_Class[map.class.seagrass$Out_Class != 4] <- NA
  levels(map.class.seagrass$Out_Class) <- data.frame(id=4, cover = labels.icecreams[4])
```

```{r ndvi}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

map.ndvi <- import.ndvi('data/ndvi/S2C_MSIL2A_20250715T113341_N0511_R080_T29TNF_20250715T165315_ndvi.tif')

pal.ndvi <- colorNumeric(c('white','darkgreen'), domain = c(0, 1), na.color = "transparent")
```

```{r icecreamsspc}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

pal.spc <- colorNumeric(c('white','darkgreen'), domain = c(20, 100), na.color = "transparent")
```

```{r icecreamsuncertainty}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

pal.unc <- colorNumeric(c('#9fc8c8','#54a1a1','#1f6f6f'), domain = c(0, 1), na.color = "transparent")
```

```{r icecreamscombinedmap}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

m.icecreams <- leaflet() %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.PositronNoLabels) %>%
  setView(map_centre[1], map_centre[2], 12) %>%
  # ice creams class map
  addRasterImage(map.class, colors = pal.class, group = 'Classification map') %>%
  addLegend(position = 'bottomleft', colors = pal.icecreams, values = 1:9, labels = labels.icecreams, opacity = 1, group = 'Legend: Class') %>%
  # ice creams seagrass only map
  addRasterImage(map.class.seagrass, colors = pal.icecreams[4], group = 'Seagrass map') %>%
  addLegend(position = 'bottomleft', colors = pal.icecreams[4], values = 4, labels = labels.icecreams[4], opacity = 1, group = 'Legend: Seagrass') %>%
  # NDVI map
  addRasterImage(map.ndvi, colors = pal.ndvi, group = 'NDVI') %>%
  addLegend_decreasing(position = 'bottomleft', pal = pal.ndvi, values = c(0.2, 1), opacity = 1, decreasing = TRUE, group = 'Legend: NDVI') %>%
  # ice creams seagrass percent cover map
  addRasterImage(map.class$Seagrass_Cover, colors = pal.spc, group = 'Seagrass percent cover') %>%
  addLegend_decreasing(position = 'bottomleft', pal = pal.spc, values = c(20, 100), opacity = 1, decreasing = TRUE, group = 'Legend: Percent cover (%)') %>%
  # ice creams uncertainty map 
  addRasterImage(map.class$Class_Probs, colors = pal.unc, group = 'Class probability') %>%
  addLegend_decreasing(position = 'bottomleft', pal = pal.unc, values = c(0, 1), opacity = 1, decreasing = TRUE, group = 'Legend: Probability') %>%
  # outline of natural & rewilded sites
  addPolygons(data = group_bounds, color = ~colour, opacity = 1, fillColor = 'transparent', group = 'Sample sites') %>%
  addLegend(position = 'bottomleft', colors = c('darkred','darkgreen'), values = c('rewilded', 'natural'), labels = c('Rewilded', 'Natural'), group = 'Sample sites') %>%
  # layer control
  addLayersControl(
    baseGroups = c('Classification map', 'Seagrass map', 'NDVI', 'Seagrass percent cover', 'Class probability'),
    overlayGroups = c('Sample sites', 'Legend: Class', 'Legend: Seagrass', 'Legend: NDVI', 'Legend: Percent cover (%)', 'Legend: Probability'),
    options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
  ) %>%
  hideGroup(c('Legend: Seagrass', 'Legend: NDVI', 'Legend: Percent cover (%)', 'Legend: Probability'))
m.icecreams
```

# Biomass prediction 

```{r predictedbiomass}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

derive.agb <- function(ndvi) {
  agb <- ndvi * 140 - 9.5
    agb[agb < 0] <- 0
  
  return(mask(agb, map.class$Out_Class, inverse = TRUE, maskvalues = 4))
}

map.agb <- derive.agb(map.ndvi)

derive.bgb <- function(agb) {
  bgb <- agb * 0.69 + 9.1
    bgb[agb == 0] <- 0
  
  return(bgb)
}

map.bgb <- derive.bgb(map.agb)

map.tgb <- map.agb + map.bgb

## calculate AGB and BGB over unit area (g/m2) 
## conversion first to stock by multiplying by pixel area of Sentinel-2
## then conversion to kg by dividing by 100
s2map_to_stock <- function(map) {
  total <- map %>%
    global(fun = 'sum', na.rm = TRUE) %>%
    "*"(100) %>%
    unlist()
  
  return(total)
}

## conversion to Mg (divide by 1e6)
biomass.agb <- s2map_to_stock(map.agb) / 1000000
biomass.bgb <- s2map_to_stock(map.bgb) / 1000000
biomass.tgb <- s2map_to_stock(map.tgb) / 1000000

## shared palette
max.biomass <- global(map.tgb, fun = 'max', na.rm = TRUE) %>%
  unlist() %>%
  round() 
pal.biomass <- colorNumeric(c('palegreen','darkolivegreen'), domain = c(0, max.biomass), na.color = 'transparent')
```

```{r predictedcarbonstock}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

## g/m2 * g/g --> g as output
aveiro.carbon.leaf.factor <- 0.2870144
derive.carbon.leaf <- function(map.biomass.leaf) {
  map.biomass.leaf * aveiro.carbon.leaf.factor
}

map.agc <- derive.carbon.leaf(map.agb)

## g/m2 * g/g --> g as output
aveiro.carbon.root.factor <- 0.252088
derive.carbon.root <- function(map.biomass.root) {
  map.biomass.root * aveiro.carbon.root.factor
}

map.bgc <- derive.carbon.leaf(map.bgb)

# calculate total seagrass extent covered, based on a Sentinel-2 pixel area
area.seagrass <- map.class.seagrass$Out_Class %>%
  noNA() %>%
  s2map_to_stock()

# based on Ana Sousa's paper that the mean annual seagrass soil carbon in the top 10 cm is 162 g C/m2
sousa.soil.mean <- 162.8
carbon.soil <- sousa.soil.mean * area.seagrass / 1000000

map.tgc <- map.agc + map.bgc + sousa.soil.mean



## conversion to Mg (divide by 1e6)
carbon.agc <- s2map_to_stock(map.agc) / 1000000
carbon.bgc <- s2map_to_stock(map.bgc) / 1000000
carbon.tgc <- s2map_to_stock(map.tgc) / 1000000

## shared palette
max.carbon <- global(map.tgc, fun = 'max', na.rm = TRUE) %>%
  unlist() %>%
  round()
pal.carbon <- colorNumeric(c('ivory','black'), domain = c(0, max.carbon), na.color = 'transparent')
```

```{r mapbiomass}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

m.biomass <- leaflet() %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.PositronNoLabels) %>%
  setView(map_centre[1], map_centre[2], 12) %>%
  # NDVI map
  addRasterImage(map.ndvi, colors = pal.ndvi, group = 'NDVI') %>%
  addLegend_decreasing(position = 'bottomleft', pal = pal.ndvi, values = c(0.2, 1), opacity = 1, decreasing = TRUE, group = 'Legend: NDVI') %>%
  # AGB map
  addRasterImage(map.agb, colors = pal.biomass, group = 'Leaf biomass') %>%
  addLegend_decreasing(position = 'bottomleft', pal = pal.biomass, values = c(0, max.biomass), opacity = 1, decreasing = TRUE, group = 'Legend: Biomass (g DW/m<sup>2</sup>)') %>%
  # BGB map
  addRasterImage(map.bgb, colors = pal.biomass, group = 'Root biomass') %>%
  # TGB map
  addRasterImage(map.tgb, colors = pal.biomass, group = 'Total biomass') %>%
  # AGC map
  addRasterImage(map.agc, colors = pal.carbon, group = 'Leaf carbon') %>%
  addLegend_decreasing(position = 'bottomleft', pal = pal.carbon, values = c(0, max.carbon), opacity = 1, decreasing = TRUE, group = 'Legend: Carbon (g C/m<sup>2</sup>)') %>%
  # BGC map
  addRasterImage(map.bgc, colors = pal.carbon, group = 'Root carbon') %>%
  # TGC map
  addRasterImage(map.tgc, colors = pal.carbon, group = 'Total carbon') %>%
  # outline of natural & rewilded sites
  addPolygons(data = group_bounds, color = ~colour, opacity = 1, fillColor = 'transparent', group = 'Sample sites') %>%
  addLegend(position = 'bottomleft', colors = c('darkred','darkgreen'), values = c('rewilded', 'natural'), labels = c('Rewilded', 'Natural'), group = 'Sample sites') %>%
  # layer control
  addLayersControl(
    baseGroups = c('NDVI', 'Leaf biomass', 'Root biomass', 'Total biomass', 'Leaf carbon', 'Root carbon', 'Total carbon'),
    overlayGroups = c('Sample sites', 'Legend: NDVI', 'Legend: Biomass (g DW/m<sup>2</sup>)', 'Legend: Carbon (g C/m<sup>2</sup>)'),
    options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
  ) %>%
  hideGroup(c('NDVI', 'Legend: NDVI', 'Legend: Carbon (g C/m<sup>2</sup>)')) %>%
  showGroup('Leaf biomass')
m.biomass
```

# Carbon stock prediction

```{r biomassCarbonTable}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# function to calculate mean pixel with plus/minus sd
mean_sd_pixel <- function(map) {
  mean.pixel <- map %>%
    global(fun = 'mean', na.rm = TRUE) %>%
    unlist() %>%
    round(2)
  
  sd.pixel <- map %>%
    global(fun = 'sd', na.rm = TRUE) %>%
    unlist() %>%
    round(2)
  
  return(paste(mean.pixel, '\u00B1', sd.pixel))
}

table.bc <- data.frame(
    list(
      "component" = c('Aboveground', 'Belowground', 'Soil','Total'),
      "extent" = rep(area.seagrass, 4) %>% unlist(),
      "biomass_per_area" = c(mean_sd_pixel(map.agb), mean_sd_pixel(map.bgb), 'NA', mean_sd_pixel(map.tgb)),
      "biomass" = c(round(biomass.agb, 2), round(biomass.bgb, 2), 'NA', round(biomass.tgb, 2)),
      "carbon_content" = c(round(aveiro.carbon.leaf.factor, 3), round(aveiro.carbon.root.factor, 3), 'NA', 'NA'),
      "carbon_per_area" = c(mean_sd_pixel(map.agc), mean_sd_pixel(map.bgc), sousa.soil.mean, mean_sd_pixel(map.tgc)),
      "carbon_stock" = c(round(carbon.agc, 3), round(carbon.bgc, 3), format(carbon.soil, scientific = FALSE), round(carbon.agc + carbon.bgc + carbon.soil, 3))
    )) 

names(table.bc) <- c("Component", "Total seagrass extent<br>(m^2^)", "Mean biomass per area<br>(g DW/m^2^)", "Total biomass<br>(Mg DW)", "Carbon content<br>(g C/g DW)", "Mean carbon stock per area<br>(g C/m^2^)", "Total carbon stock<br>(Mg C)")

knitr::kable(table.bc, 
             format = "pipe",
             align = 'c',
             caption = 'Seagrass biomass and carbon at Ria de Aveiro. "DW" denotes the dry weight of the seagrass samples while "C" denotes the carbon in the seagrass samples. The mean monthly soil carbon stock per area reported in Sousa et al. is included in the total carbon estimates.')
```

# Seasonal change in seagrass biomass

```{r phenologyCalculations}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

  phenology$extent <- NA
  phenology$ag_b_perArea <- NA
  phenology$bg_b_perArea <- NA
  phenology$tg_b_perArea <- NA
  phenology$ag_b_total <- NA
  phenology$bg_b_total <- NA
  phenology$tg_b_total <- NA
  phenology$ag_c_perArea <- NA
  phenology$bg_c_perArea <- NA
  phenology$tg_c_perArea <- NA
  phenology$ag_c_total <- NA
  phenology$bg_c_total <- NA
  phenology$tg_c_total <- NA
  
mean_pixel <- function(map) {
  mean.pixel <- map %>%
    global(fun = 'mean', na.rm = TRUE) %>%
    unlist() %>%
    round(2)
  
  return(mean.pixel)
}

for (n in phenology$tile.name) {
  pheno.class <- list.files('data/ice_creams_prediction', full.names = TRUE) %>%
    grep(n, ., value = TRUE) %>%
    import.icecreams()
    levels(pheno.class$Out_Class) <- data.frame(id=1:9, cover = labels.icecreams)

  pheno.class.seagrass <- pheno.class$Out_Class
    pheno.class.seagrass[pheno.class.seagrass != 4] <- NA
      levels(pheno.class.seagrass) <- data.frame(id=4, cover = labels.icecreams[4])
  phenology$extent[phenology$tile.name == n] <- pheno.class.seagrass %>%
    noNA() %>%
    s2map_to_stock()

  pheno.ndvi <- list.files('data/ndvi', full.names = TRUE) %>%
    grep(n, ., value = TRUE) %>%
    import.icecreams()

  pheno.agb <- derive.agb(pheno.ndvi)
  pheno.bgb <- derive.bgb(pheno.agb)
  pheno.tgb <- pheno.agb + pheno.bgb
  pheno.agc <- derive.carbon.leaf(pheno.agb)
  pheno.bgc <- derive.carbon.root(pheno.bgb)
  pheno.tgc <- pheno.agc + pheno.bgc + sousa.soil.mean

  phenology$ag_b_perArea[phenology$tile.name == n] <- mean_pixel(pheno.agb)
  phenology$bg_b_perArea[phenology$tile.name == n] <- mean_pixel(pheno.bgb)
  phenology$tg_b_perArea[phenology$tile.name == n] <- mean_pixel(pheno.tgb)
  phenology$ag_b_total[phenology$tile.name == n] <- s2map_to_stock(pheno.agb) / 1000000
  phenology$bg_b_total[phenology$tile.name == n] <- s2map_to_stock(pheno.bgb) / 1000000
  phenology$tg_b_total[phenology$tile.name == n] <- s2map_to_stock(pheno.tgb) / 1000000

  phenology$ag_c_perArea[phenology$tile.name == n] <- mean_pixel(pheno.agc)
  phenology$bg_c_perArea[phenology$tile.name == n] <- mean_pixel(pheno.bgc)
  phenology$tg_c_perArea[phenology$tile.name == n] <- mean_pixel(pheno.tgc)
  phenology$ag_c_total[phenology$tile.name == n] <- s2map_to_stock(pheno.agc) / 1000000
  phenology$bg_c_total[phenology$tile.name == n] <- s2map_to_stock(pheno.bgc) / 1000000
  phenology$tg_c_total[phenology$tile.name == n] <- s2map_to_stock(pheno.tgc) / 1000000
}
```

```{r phenologybiomassgraph}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.cap: Predicted biomass and carbon values of the aboveground, belowground and total components of the seagrass meadows in Ria de Aveiro in the years 2024 and 2025. The mean monthly soil carbon stock per area from Sousa et al. was included in the total carbon estimate.

phenology.longer <- phenology %>%
  pivot_longer(contains("_"), names_to = c('component', 'material', 'scale'), names_sep = "_")

phenology.longer$material <- factor(phenology.longer$material, labels =  c('b' = 'Biomass', 'c' = 'Carbon'))
phenology.longer$scale <- factor(phenology.longer$scale, labels =  c('perArea' = "Mean~pixel~value~(g/m^{2})", 'total' = "Total~(Mg)"))

ggplot(phenology.longer, aes(x = date, y = value, colour = component)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  xlab('Date') + ylab('Value (See grid labels for units)') +
  scale_colour_discrete('Component', labels = c('ag' = 'Aboveground', 'bg' = 'Belowground', 'tg' = 'Total')) +
  facet_grid(scale ~ material, scales = 'free', labeller = label_parsed)
```


# Reference
